name: ModMe Core Agent Collection
description: Essential agents and skills for the Monorepo_ModMe project — covering architecture decisions, CI/CD, code quality, accessibility, and full-stack Next.js development.

items.usage: CI/CD pipeline design, workflow security, GitHub Actions best practices
Architecture Decision Records — generate and maintain ADRs
Security audit on code changes, OWASP top 10, secret scanning
WCAG 2.2 AA accessibility audit and remediation
REST/GraphQL API design, OpenAPI spec generation
High-signal code review focused on bugs and security
Technical documentation, READMEs, and API docs
Full quality engineering audit — spec tests, code review, Council of Three
Map and onboard into an unfamiliar codebase
Three-layer AI output verification with citations
Audit and optimize GitHub Actions CI minutes and cost
Generate AGENTS.md documentation for any repo
Merge mature lessons from domain memory into instruction files
